title: cyclosorus subcaudipinnus
intro: Cyclosorus subcaudipinnus, also known as the fern-like plant, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus subcaudipinnus can be made into infusions or decoctions, and its leaves can be dried and used in tea blends or as a dried powder for various medicinal purposes.
